title: Solar Skill Registry Entry v2
description: Draft v2 schema for Skill entries in solar_skills.py registry.yaml. Adds role, skill_version, mcp_tools, policy_refs, verification_contract. Backward compatible: v1 fields preserved.

name.description: Skill name slug. Must be unique within registry.

role.description: Skill role. macro=decomposition hint (advisory). implementation=executable recipe. enforcer=mandatory gate (hard stop). Default for migrated v1 entries: 'implementation'.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this skill does.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Matches solar_skills.py lifecycle states.

injectable.description: Whether this skill can be injected into dispatch context.

executable.description: Whether this skill has an executable implementation (not just advisory).

items.description: MCP capability token. Must match capability.schema.json pattern.

mcp_tools.description: List of MCP capability tokens required for execution. APO resolves each via capability_registry.py:186 cmd_query.

policy_refs.description: List of policy IDs that govern execution of this skill. APO enforces all listed policies before dispatch.

must_pass.description: List of check names that must pass for skill to be considered complete.

verification_contract.description: Post-execution verification rules. Required for role=implementation and role=enforcer.

macro_override.description: When true, APO may ignore this skill's macro decomposition in favor of direct implementation. Only meaningful for role=macro.

tags.description: Classification tags for APO task-type matching.

promoted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when skill was promoted to stable.
